nasb.text: Hear this word, you cows of Bashan who are on the mountain of Samaria, Who oppress the poor, who crush the needy, Who say to your husbands, “Bring now, that we may drink!”

esv.text: “Hear this word, you cows of Bashan, who are on the mountain of Samaria, who oppress the poor, who crush the needy, who say to your husbands, ‘Bring, that we may drink!’

cnv.text: 撒瑪利亞山上的巴珊母牛啊！要聽這話； 你們欺負貧窮人，壓迫窮苦人， 又對自己的丈夫說：“拿酒來，給我們飲用。”

ccb.text: 住在撒玛利亚山上的巴珊肥母牛啊， 你们要听！ 你们压榨贫寒人，欺凌穷苦人， 又使唤丈夫倒酒畅饮。
